column1: Dataset Title: Bolshezemelskaya tundra Arctic Vegetation Archive: Dedov historical Vegetation Plots
Dataset Reference: Dedov, A.A. (1940). Rastitelnost Malozemelskoy i Timanskoy tundra (Vegetation of Malozemelskaya and Timanskaya Tundra). Severnaya Baza Akademii Nauk S.S.S.R.
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Dedov historical Vegetation Plots

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the Drude cover-abundance scale: 1 (<0,16%), 2 (0,16-0,8%), 3 (0,8-4%), 4 (4-20), and 5 (20-80), 6 (80-100%). Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
